title: template_config
description: Schema for a template's `template.json` (v011 K5). v1 templates declare format version, spec_root location, optional doctor extensibility hooks, and optional LLM-prompt paths. v2 additionally requires `spec_files` — a manifest mapping every materialized spec-target file to a per-file `kind` (markdown | diagram_source | diagram_rendered) that governs heading-coverage applicability, LLM-context inclusion, and history-snapshot scope.

template_format_version.description: Template format version. v1 is markdown-only (implicit manifest synthesized from the seed prompt's well-known file set). v2 declares `spec_files` explicitly and enables the diagram_source / diagram_rendered file kinds.

spec_root.description: Directory under the repo root containing the spec files, proposed_changes/, and history/. Templates that place spec files directly at the repo root set './'.

spec_files.description: v2-only manifest. Maps spec-target-relative path strings to per-file declarations. Per `contracts.md` §"Template manifest wire contract", each value carries exactly one of: {kind: markdown}, {kind: diagram_source}, or {kind: diagram_rendered, derived_from: <path>}. The cross-property invariant that `derived_from` MUST resolve to a `kind: diagram_source` entry in this same manifest is enforced at the validator layer (post-schema), not by JSON Schema.

kind.description: Per-file kind discriminator. `markdown` files are subject to heading-coverage and LLM-context inclusion. `diagram_source` files are LLM-readable text (PlantUML, Mermaid, ...) included in LLM-context but exempt from heading-coverage. `diagram_rendered` files are opaque rendered output, snapshotted into history but excluded from LLM-context.

derived_from.description: REQUIRED iff kind is diagram_rendered. Spec-target-relative path of the diagram_source from which this rendered output is produced by the project-declared render command. Multiple diagram_rendered entries MAY share the same derived_from value (a single source can render to multiple outputs).

doctor_static_check_modules.description: Paths relative to the template root naming Python modules that contribute additional doctor-static checks via TEMPLATE_CHECKS export.

doctor_llm_objective_checks_prompt.description: Path relative to the template root naming a Markdown prompt for the LLM-driven objective-checks phase. null disables this template's contribution.

doctor_llm_subjective_checks_prompt.description: Path relative to the template root naming a Markdown prompt for the LLM-driven subjective-checks phase. null disables this template's contribution.
